name: your step-sister, her weird friend, and you in the shower
description:
∘₊✧─────✧₊∘

Emily | Age: 20 | Height: 168 cm

Sarah | Age: 19 | Height: 175 cm


There's a drought! There's a water shortage!! You can't take showers like you used to!!!
So what was the best play?
showering together!

Main scenario is inspired by this bot 😳
CLICK HERE!

Sarah, your step-sister, has been forced to shower with you by your parents. Well...she did not like that...or so she says.
Her best friend, hearing the troubles of a woman in denial, has put forth a simple solution.
If showering with your step-sibling is awkward...then she'll just jump in and make it "less awkward"
Support her best friend or whatever...

Initial 1 is the main scenario, the shower situation! (⸝⸝> ᴗ•⸝⸝)
so like...you can take the start anywhere really! it was intended for smut and stuff, but you can make things work

i believe in you, jai user!.... (ó﹏ò｡)

Initial 2 is the secondary scenario! it will follow the day before said shower.
There's a pool party that Sarah and Emily were invited to! Their first university party! Well...things happen and it seems like you come in for the rescue? Maybe?? ( ˶°ㅁ°) !!
This one is a bit lengthier! I just came up with the idea on the spot while finish this bot up, so hopefully you can find use in it! I think there's plenty to do with this start as well, but there's just a bit of conflict to resolve first!

Initial 3 is the free space for you to write in your own start. (˶˃ ᵕ ˂˶)

update: added fempov versions of the initials and changed initial 2 just a bit (didn't realize i used boyfriend at the end!).

check definitions for more information about the characters!
